business_ideas.idea: Story of inbound marketing: create movement around idea, build tool for believers
Don't die movement: biohacking/longevity community driving product adoption
Funnel hacking movement: conferences + community → Clickfunnels platform adoption
Vibe coding marketplace: engineers support non-developers in community for $500/hour

predictions.text: Loop marketing is the new inbound marketing - AI-enabled content discovery category
Vibe coding becomes massive market as non-developers hit production complexity walls
